class.name: GDKAsyncOp
class.brief_description: Async operation handle for GDK XAsync-backed requests.
class.description: Represents an in-flight asynchronous GDK operation. Connect to [signal completed] or poll [method is_done] to check status. Call [method get_result] after completion to retrieve the result.

method.name: is_done
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the async operation has completed.

method.name: cancel
method.description: Attempts to cancel the in-flight operation. Returns [code]true[/code] if cancellation was requested successfully.

method.name: get_result
method.description: Returns the [GDKResult] of the completed operation. Only valid after [method is_done] returns [code]true[/code] or after the [signal completed] signal fires.

signal.name: completed
signal.description: Emitted when the async operation completes. The [param result] contains the operation outcome.
